offences.offenceTitle: Conspire to assault a person thereby occasioning them actual bodily harm
offences.wording:
Leo Kuhn at Mitchel Groves, conspired together with Al Homenick to assault Kenny O'Connell, thereby occasioning actual bodily harm.
Contrary to sections 1,1A and 3 of the Criminal Law Act 1977.

results.resultText:
IMP - Imprisonment
Committed to prison for 8 Years. Reason: failure to comply with a pre-sentence drug testing order because of an unprovoked attack of a serious nature. Bail remand days to count (Tagged Days): 6. Total custodial period is life.
